label: Entity Role
source: Determined by applying Article 3 classification criteria (size, sector, specific entity type) to the entity's profile. Member States establish and maintain official lists under Article 3(3).

label: Sector

value_descriptions.energy_electricity: Entities operating in the electricity sector including electricity undertakings, distribution/transmission system operators, producers, nominated electricity market operators, market participants providing aggregation/demand response/storage services, and operators of recharging points. Defined by reference to Directive (EU) 2019/944 and Regulation (EU) 2019/943. Annex I, sector 1(a).
value_descriptions.energy_district_heating_cooling: Operators of district heating or district cooling systems as defined in Article 2(19) of Directive (EU) 2018/2001. Annex I, sector 1(b).
value_descriptions.energy_oil: Operators of oil transmission pipelines; operators of oil production, refining and treatment facilities, storage and transmission; central stockholding entities under Council Directive 2009/119/EC. Annex I, sector 1(c).
value_descriptions.energy_gas: Supply undertakings, distribution/transmission system operators, storage/LNG system operators, natural gas undertakings, and operators of natural gas refining and treatment facilities under Directive 2009/73/EC. Annex I, sector 1(d).
value_descriptions.energy_hydrogen: Operators of hydrogen production, storage and transmission. Annex I, sector 1(e).
value_descriptions.transport_air: Air carriers for commercial purposes, airport managing bodies, traffic management control operators providing ATC services, and entities operating ancillary airport installations. Annex I, sector 2(a).
value_descriptions.transport_rail: Infrastructure managers and railway undertakings (including operators of service facilities) under Directive 2012/34/EU. Annex I, sector 2(b).
value_descriptions.transport_water: Inland, sea and coastal water transport companies; managing bodies of ports including port facilities; operators of vessel traffic services. Excludes individual vessels operated by companies. Annex I, sector 2(c).
value_descriptions.transport_road: Road authorities responsible for traffic management control (excluding public entities for which this is non-essential) and operators of Intelligent Transport Systems. Annex I, sector 2(d).
value_descriptions.banking: Credit institutions as defined in Article 4(1) of Regulation (EU) No 575/2013. Annex I, sector 3.
value_descriptions.financial_market_infrastructures: Operators of trading venues and central counterparties (CCPs). Annex I, sector 4.
value_descriptions.health: Healthcare providers; EU reference laboratories; entities conducting medicinal product R&D; manufacturers of basic pharmaceutical products and pharmaceutical preparations; manufacturers of critical medical devices (public health emergency critical devices list). Annex I, sector 5.
value_descriptions.drinking_water: Suppliers and distributors of water intended for human consumption under Directive (EU) 2020/2184, excluding distributors for whom distribution is non-essential to their general activity. Annex I, sector 6.
value_descriptions.waste_water: Undertakings collecting, disposing of or treating urban, domestic or industrial waste water under Council Directive 91/271/EEC, excluding those for whom waste water is non-essential. Annex I, sector 7.
value_descriptions.digital_infrastructure: Internet Exchange Point (IXP) providers; DNS service providers (excluding root name servers); TLD name registries; cloud computing service providers; data centre service providers; content delivery network providers; trust service providers; providers of public electronic communications networks; providers of publicly available electronic communications services. Annex I, sector 8.
value_descriptions.ict_service_management_b2b: Managed service providers and managed security service providers offering services to other businesses. Annex I, sector 9.
value_descriptions.public_administration_central: Public administration entities of central governments as defined by Member States in accordance with national law. Annex I, sector 10.
value_descriptions.public_administration_regional: Public administration entities at regional level as defined by a Member State where, following a risk-based assessment, disruption could have a significant impact on critical societal or economic activities. Annex I, sector 10.
value_descriptions.space: Operators of ground-based infrastructure, owned/managed/operated by Member States or private parties, that support the provision of space-based services, excluding providers of public electronic communications networks. Annex I, sector 11.
value_descriptions.postal_and_courier: Postal service providers including providers of courier services as defined in Directive 97/67/EC. Annex II, sector 1.
value_descriptions.waste_management: Undertakings carrying out waste management under Directive 2008/98/EC, excluding those for whom waste management is not their principal economic activity. Annex II, sector 2.
value_descriptions.manufacture_chemicals: Undertakings manufacturing/distributing substances and mixtures or producing articles from substances/mixtures, as referred to in Regulation (EC) No 1907/2006 (REACH). Annex II, sector 3.
value_descriptions.food_production_processing_distribution: Food businesses engaged in wholesale distribution and industrial production and processing, as defined in Regulation (EC) No 178/2002. Annex II, sector 4.
value_descriptions.manufacture_medical_devices: Entities manufacturing medical devices (Regulation (EU) 2017/745) and in vitro diagnostic medical devices (Regulation (EU) 2017/746), except critical medical devices already captured in health sector. Annex II, sector 5(a).
value_descriptions.manufacture_computer_electronic_optical: Undertakings carrying out economic activities in section C division 26 of NACE Rev. 2. Annex II, sector 5(b).
value_descriptions.manufacture_electrical_equipment: Undertakings carrying out economic activities in section C division 27 of NACE Rev. 2. Annex II, sector 5(c).
value_descriptions.manufacture_machinery: Undertakings carrying out economic activities in section C division 28 of NACE Rev. 2. Annex II, sector 5(d).
value_descriptions.manufacture_motor_vehicles: Undertakings carrying out economic activities in section C division 29 of NACE Rev. 2. Annex II, sector 5(e).
value_descriptions.manufacture_other_transport_equipment: Undertakings carrying out economic activities in section C division 30 of NACE Rev. 2. Annex II, sector 5(f).
value_descriptions.digital_providers_online_marketplace: Providers of online marketplaces as defined in Article 2(n) of Directive 2005/29/EC. Annex II, sector 6.
value_descriptions.digital_providers_online_search_engine: Providers of online search engines as defined in Article 2(5) of Regulation (EU) 2019/1150. Annex II, sector 6.
value_descriptions.digital_providers_social_networking: Providers of social networking services platforms enabling end-users to connect, share, discover and communicate across multiple devices via chats, posts, videos and recommendations. Annex II, sector 6.
value_descriptions.research_organisations: Research organisations whose primary goal is to conduct applied research or experimental development with a view to exploiting results for commercial purposes. Does not include educational institutions. Annex II, sector 7.

source: Self-declared by entity and verified by competent authority against Annex I and Annex II sector definitions.

label: Number of Employees
source: Entity's own records; determined per Article 5 of the Annex to Recommendation 2003/361/EC (excluding Article 3(4) enterprise linkage calculations per Article 2(1) NIS2).

label: Annual Turnover (EUR)
source: Last approved annual accounts of the entity.

label: Annual Balance Sheet Total (EUR)
source: Last approved annual accounts of the entity.

label: Sole Provider of Essential Service in Member State
source: Determination by Member State competent authority under Article 2(2)(b).

label: Disruption Would Significantly Impact Public Safety, Security or Health
source: Risk assessment by Member State competent authority under Article 2(2)(c).

label: Disruption Would Induce Significant Systemic Risk
source: Risk assessment by Member State competent authority under Article 2(2)(d).

label: Critical at National or Regional Level
source: Assessment by Member State competent authority under Article 2(2)(e).

label: Identified as Critical Entity under Directive (EU) 2022/2557
source: Official identification by Member State under Directive (EU) 2022/2557 (CRE Directive) — applies regardless of size.

label: Provider of Public Electronic Communications Networks or Services
source: Declaration by entity; verified against Directive (EU) 2018/1972 definitions. These entities fall under jurisdiction of the Member State where they provide services (not where established).

label: Qualified Trust Service Provider
source: Listed on national Trusted List published by Member State supervisory body under Regulation (EU) No 910/2014 (eIDAS).

label: TLD Name Registry
source: Delegation by IANA; verified by competent authority.

label: DNS Service Provider (excluding root name servers)
source: Self-declared; verified by competent authority. Covers publicly available recursive resolution services and authoritative resolution services for third-party use.

label: Member State of Main Establishment
source: Determined per Article 26(2): the Member State where decisions related to cybersecurity risk-management are predominantly taken; or where cybersecurity operations are carried out; or where the entity has the highest number of employees. For entities not established in the Union: the Member State where the designated representative is established.

label: Has Designated Representative in the Union
source: Written mandate by the entity; representative must be established in a Member State where services are offered.

label: Management Body Has Approved Cybersecurity Risk-Management Measures
source: Board resolution or equivalent governance decision; documented in entity's governance records.

label: Management Body Members Have Completed Cybersecurity Training
source: Training records; management body members must follow training to gain sufficient knowledge and skills to identify cybersecurity risks and assess practices.

label: Cybersecurity Risk-Management Measures Implemented
source: Internal documentation and external audit results; covers all 10 measure categories in Article 21(2).

label: Incident Has Occurred
source: Detection by the entity's incident monitoring and detection systems.

label: Incident Qualifies as Significant
source: Entity assessment based on Article 23(3) criteria: (a) caused or capable of causing severe operational disruption or financial loss; (b) affected or capable of affecting other natural or legal persons by causing considerable material or non-material damage.

label: Incident Has Cross-Border Impact
source: Entity assessment; must be reported to enable CSIRT to determine cross-border impact under Article 23(1).

label: Date Entity Became Aware of Significant Incident
source: Entity's incident log; triggers the 24-hour early warning and 72-hour notification deadlines.

label: Date Incident Notification (72h) Was Submitted
source: Submission timestamp recorded by CSIRT or competent authority.

label: Incident Suspected to Be Caused by Unlawful or Malicious Acts
source: Entity assessment as part of early warning; must be indicated in the early warning if suspected.

label: Significant Cyber Threat Identified Affecting Services
source: Entity's threat intelligence and monitoring systems.

label: Entity Has Registered with Competent Authority
source: Submission of registration information under Article 3(4) (for entities under Art 2(1)) or Article 27(2) (for DNS/TLD/cloud/data centre/CDN/managed service/MSSSP/online marketplace/search engine/social network entities). Member States may establish national self-registration mechanisms.

label: Accurate Domain Name Registration Database Maintained
source: Audit of database records by competent authority; policies and procedures publicly available under Article 28(3).

label: Participates in Cybersecurity Information-Sharing Arrangement
source: Voluntary notification to competent authority under Article 29(4).

label: Supply Chain Security of Direct Suppliers/Service Providers Assessed
source: Documented supply chain security assessment covering overall quality, resilience, and cybersecurity practices of suppliers; must take into account coordinated supply chain risk assessment results under Article 22(1).

label: Date Registration Information Changed
source: Entity's own records; triggers the 2-week notification deadline for updating competent authority registration.
human_review_note: Auto-added: referenced as fact_relative anchor for dl_registration_changes_2weeks. Verify label and description.

label: Date Lawful Domain Registration Data Request Received
source: Timestamp of receipt of a duly justified request from a legitimate access seeker; triggers the 72-hour access-granting deadline under Article 28(5).
human_review_note: Auto-added: referenced as fact_relative anchor for dl_domain_data_access_72h. Verify label and description.

label: Entity Carries Out Activities in National Security, Public Security, Defence or Law Enforcement
source: Determination by Member State under Article 2(7); public administration entities must self-identify and seek confirmation from competent authority.

label: Entity Is Excluded from DORA Scope Under Article 2(4) of Regulation (EU) 2022/2554
source: Determination by competent authority based on Article 2(4) of Regulation (EU) 2022/2554 (DORA), which excludes specific financial entities such as micro-enterprises and small non-interconnected investment firms.

label: Was Identified as Operator of Essential Services Under NIS1 Directive
source: Historical determination by Member State under Directive (EU) 2016/1148 (NIS1); entities on national OES lists maintained prior to 18 October 2024 qualify automatically as essential entities under NIS2 Article 3(1)(h).
